title: sida eriantha
intro: Sida eriantha is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, Malvaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Sida eriantha include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as the management of diabetes and hypertension. Sida eriantha can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is also used as a topical application for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
